response_text:
ENTITY Airport
PK code
ATTR code : varchar : PK
ATTR name : varchar

ENTITY City
PK code
ATTR code : varchar : PK
ATTR name : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK code
ATTR code : varchar : PK
ATTR name : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK
ATTR scheduled_date : date
ATTR status : varchar
ATTR flight_status_time : datetime
ATTR registration : varchar

ENTITY FlightLeg
PK id
ATTR id : integer : PK
ATTR flight_number : varchar : FK
ATTR departure_airport : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_airport : varchar : FK
ATTR departure_time : datetime
ATTR arrival_time : datetime
ATTR status : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_code
ATTR crew_code : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

REL Flight -> FlightLeg : 1 -> 0..N : FK=flight_number
REL FlightLeg -> Airport : 1..N -> 1 : FK=departure_airport
REL FlightLeg -> Airport : 1..N -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport
REL FlightLeg -> CrewMember : 1..N -> 0..N : FK=crew_code
